mission.title: argo: RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s resources
mission.description: RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s resources. This issue affects 92+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=argo
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s resources

steps.title: Check current Pod configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo resources:
```bash
kubectl get pod -A
kubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>
```
I'd like to be able to give delete permissions that are more granular than the application level. Ideally, I'd like to be able to enable them for specific resource types, such as Pods, or any other re

steps.title: Apply the fix for RBAC should include separate permissions for deleting k8s re
steps.description:
Task to do

https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/assets/47184027/7ea0b523-7357-4deb-8775-a6b6d8ba5d76

Checklist:

* [x] Either (a) I've created an [enhancement proposal](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/new/choose) and discussed it with the community, (b) this is a bug fix, or (c) this doe
```yaml
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/apps/Deployment, allow
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/Pods, allow
```

steps.title: Confirm RBAC should include separate permissions for delet is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

* [x] The title of the PR states what changed and the related. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
codeSnippets:
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/apps/Deployment, allow
p, role:staging-db-admins, applications, delete, staging-db-admins/*/Pods, allow

p, role:developer, applications, delete, */*, deny
p, role:developer, applications, delete, <appproject>/<app>, defer
i, role:developer, group, pod-deleters
i, role:developer, group, config-deleters
i, role:developer, group, deployment-deleters
...

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
